title: Memories
why_this_song: Memories by Maroon 5 (2019) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Memories bring back, memories bring back you
There's a time that I remember when I never felt so lost
And I felt all of the hatred was too powerful to stop (ooh, yeah)
Here's to the ones that we got
Cheers to the "wish you were here, but you're not"
'Cause the drinks bring back all the memories

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "bring" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "bring" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "memories" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "memories" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: 'Cause the drinks bring back all the memories
Memories bring back, memories bring back you
Of everything we've been through (no, no)

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Memories", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Memories", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Memories" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Memories" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Memories" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Memories", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
